# Austria

**Summary**: A country in Europe containing the Matzen field.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-alameer|Alameer, 2023]] used data from the Matzen field to model favorable reservoir conditions.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[2023-alameer|Alameer, 2023]] 8 TH sandstone

## Formations Present

- [[2023-alameer|Alameer, 2023]] 8 TH formation

## Key Findings From This Location

- The Matzen field had a viscosity ratio of 5 and produced 2,058,308 BBL. ([[2023-alameer|Alameer, 2023, p. 73]])
